creator: tcberner@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 170787
Add py-qtscript as a dependency, and switch to USE_PYQT

devel/py-pykde4 needs devel/py-qt4-script (fixed by groot@kde.org in area51/trunk r12000).

Further, we can also make use of USES=pyqt:4 and USE_PYQT instead of setting RUN_- and BUILD_DEPENDS by hand.
